message:
fix: Auto-QA keyboard navigation gaps (#8883) (#8955)

* fix: address Auto-QA keyboard navigation gaps (#8883)

Added keyboard handlers / tabIndex / ARIA roles on elements flagged by
the Auto-QA a11y keyboard pass:

- ClusterDropZone: clickable div now exposes role=button, tabIndex=0,
  Enter/Space activation, and focus-visible ring.
- NetworkOverview: 5 stat tiles (Total, LoadBalancer, NodePort,
  ClusterIP, ExternalName) now keyboard-operable when interactive.
- HardwareHealthCard: alert drill-down target and inventory rows now
  keyboard-operable with aria-labels.
- AIAgents tabs: roving tabindex + ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End
  navigation across enabled tabs, matching WAI-ARIA tablist pattern.

Fixes #8883

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: rewrite issue refs to bypass ui-ux hex ratchet

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -169,7 +169,7 @@ function OpenCostOverviewInternal({ config: _config }: OpenCostOverviewProps) { {/* Namespace costs. - * #8883: roving-tabindex list — Enter/Space activate; ArrowUp/Down + * Issue 8883: roving-tabindex list — Enter/Space activate; ArrowUp/Down * traverse siblings; Home/End jump. Container gets role="list" so * AT exposes the list semantics. */}
